description_long: This is a pair of compact scissors featuring stainless steel blades and ergonomic plastic handles. The handles are coated in a light blue material with yellow inner rings, providing a comfortable and secure grip. The blades are joined by a visible central rivet, ensuring smooth pivoting action. The finger loops are symmetrical and rounded, with soft-looking yellow inserts for added comfort. The blade tips are rounded for safety, making them suitable for general use, including in environments with children. There is a visible brand marking etched onto the metal near the joint.
description: Compact scissors with stainless steel blades and blue ergonomic handles with yellow inserts. Rounded safety tips and a visible brand marking on the blade.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing both blue handles with yellow inserts and the open, rounded blade tips.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the blades and the thickness of the plastic handles.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the handles and blade tips from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and handle thickness.
attribute_handle_type: Symmetrical, ergonomic, ambidextrous handles with blue plastic coating and yellow soft grip inserts.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Visible central rivet joint, non-adjustable, standard design.
attribute_finger_loop_design: Two equal-sized, rounded loops with yellow soft inserts for comfort; suitable for either hand.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Rounded safety tips designed to prevent accidental injury.
attribute_brand_marking: There is a visible brand marking etched on the metal near the pivot joint.
